## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change made by this pull request.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Maintenance or CI

## Verification

- [ ] `node --check popup.js`
- [ ] `manifest.json` parses successfully
- [ ] Loaded the extension through `chrome://extensions`
- [ ] Manually tested the affected flow in Chrome
- [ ] Updated documentation or `CHANGELOG.md` when needed

## Security and Compatibility

- Permission changes: none, or explain them here.
- Browser/OS tested:
- Screenshots or recording for UI changes:

## Review Notes

Call out tradeoffs, follow-up work, or areas that need particular reviewer attention.
